summary: Customer Experience Reset Pass - All critical bug fixes and redesign features verified. CRITICAL BUG FIX CONFIRMED: ProtectedRoute now correctly redirects unauthenticated customers to /auth (customer auth) instead of /login (team portal). All 3 logins working (admin, RM, customer). Dark-themed customer home, minimal action pills, RM card with dark design, SplashScreen exclusion, and BottomTabBar behavior all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute (App.js lines 72-78) correctly redirects customer routes to /auth and team routes to /login
SplashScreen exclusion logic (App.js lines 349-350) correctly excludes /my-cases and /home paths
CustomerOnlyUI (App.js lines 147-148) correctly hides BottomTabBar on case detail pages
RM card in CustomerCaseDetail has dark theme background
Action rows (not boxed grid) implemented in CustomerCaseDetail overview
BottomTabBar auth checks working - redirects to /auth when not authenticated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Experience Reset Pass complete. All features verified: (1) CRITICAL BUG FIX - ProtectedRoute redirects to /auth not /login for customer routes, (2) Dark-themed CustomerHome with action pills, (3) CustomerCaseDetail with dark RM card and action rows, (4) SplashScreen excluded for /home and /my-cases paths, (5) BottomTabBar hidden on case detail pages, (6) All 3 logins working.

features_verified.CRITICAL_BUG_FIX_ProtectedRoute_redirect: PASS - Unauthenticated users clicking My Case/Messages/Profile tabs redirect to /auth (customer auth), NOT /login (team portal)

features_verified.Global_Header_hidden_on_case_detail_mobi: PASS - Not rendered (CustomerCaseDetail has own header)
